keys.description: A list of custom handlers mapped to specific URL schemes or content types.
The bundle identifier of the application preferred for all roles (viewer, editor, shell).
The URL scheme (e.g., http, mailto) that the handler responds to.
The Uniform Type Identifier (UTI) describing the file type that the handler responds to.
The bundle identifier of the application preferred for viewing the file format.
The bundle identifier of the application preferred for editing the file format.
